    • renew

      public abstract void renew(Instant expiresAt)
      Renew the entitlement.
      Parameters:
      expiresAt - the new expiration time

    • delete

      public abstract void delete()
      Delete the entitlement.

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid()

    • isPersistent

      public boolean isPersistent()

    • unassignFromGuild

      public abstract boolean unassignFromGuild()
      Unassign the entitlement from the guild. If the target() is SkuTarget.GUILD the guild cant be unassigned.

    • assignToGuild

      public abstract boolean assignToGuild(long guildId)
      Assign the entitlement to a guild. If the target() is SkuTarget.GUILD the guild cant be changed.
      Parameters:
      guildId - the guild id to assign the entitlement to
